name: codex-noise-filter
description: Coding-task noise reduction, indexed rules, call-chain checks, and lightweight validation for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Coding-task noise reduction and indexed rule routing
interface.longDescription: Use codex-noise-filter to route coding tasks through indexed references, confirm touched scope and call chains, align existing code locally, and run the lightest relevant validation.
defaultPrompt: Use codex-noise-filter for this coding task.
List the references, touched scope, and validation checks.
Debug this failure with the indexed workflow.
